name: Japan
culture_notes: Visual: 'Baraeti' (Variety Show) style layout. Not just thick borders, but colorful, layered captions that explain 'Why this is amazing'.
Typography: Mix 'Mincho' (elegant/serious) for lore and 'Kanteiryu/Brush' (impactful) for combat/gacha results.
Social Proof: Must include 'Ranking indicators' (e.g., App Store #1, 5-star rating) or 'User Reviews' style overlays to lower psychological resistance.
Character focus: Use 'Seiyuu' (CV) name tags prominently. In Japan, the VA is often a bigger draw than the gameplay itself.
The 'Gentei' (Limited) Hook: Emphasize 'Time-limited' or 'Pre-registration exclusive' rewards using red/gold flashing effects.
creative_hooks: The 'Failed Choice' vs 'Professional Success' (Classic but still high CTR in JP hyper-casual/sim).
The 'Comparison' hook: Showing a 'Common Player' vs a 'Pro Player' using the Gacha results.
ASMR/Satisfying sounds: High-quality UI clicking sounds and Gacha 'rainbow' flash sound effects.
Voiceover: Start with a high-energy 'Iku zo!' or a soft, inviting character greeting to break the scroll.

tone_and_manner.politeness: High (Desu/Masu). Use 'O-kyakusama' mindset in service-related text.
tone_and_manner.trust_building: Transparency in Gacha rates and clear 'How to play' instructions (Tutorial-style ads).

preferred_bgm: High-tempo J-Pop/Anime Rock for action; Lofi/Piano for 'Iyashikei' (healing) or Simulation games.
focus: Character Emotional Bond (Engagement) > Gacha Thrill (Monetization) > Competitive Status (Retention)
